steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject is Food writer J. Kenji López-Alt—one person. The relative clause who explores the science behind cooking doesn't change the fact that the subject is singular.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A singular subject requires a singular verb. Explains is singular, so it matches the subject. B, C, and D are all plural verb forms that don't agree. That matches choice A — A is correct.
